steps.title: Identify the crucial metaphor
steps.content: The underlined line says Bitter’s feet were ‘singing the news,’ using the verb ‘singing’ to show that her footsteps are conveying information to Jam.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C says the sentence adds to the idea that Bitter’s footsteps reveal something to Jam, which matches the metaphor that her footsteps are ‘singing the news’—they tell Jam the painting is finished. The other choices either ascribe the reaction to Aloe, claim Jam prefers music, or say Bitter always sings—none of which are supported by the passage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
